_doc: Hand-edited per release. Tap the version chip on Home to open. Newest first; trim to ~10 entries.

entries.title: Streak Inject — recover a lost chain
notes: When a streak of ≥2 days lapses 1–7 days ago, Home's OVERCLOCK slot is replaced by a corrupt red INJECT tile (jittering, glitch text, skull motif)
15-card review (no SRS writes); needs ≥12/15 accuracy to roll, then 20% RNG to actually patch the chain
+5% recovery odds per failed attempt (cap 50%), 3 attempts/day, snapshot persists 7 days
+60 XP consolation when accuracy is met but the roll rejects
Daily run always wins the slot first — INJECT only surfaces post-clear so it can't be traded for required practice
Patched gap days render a pixel smiley on the streak calendar instead of empty cells
New-operator safeguards: account age ≥7d AND best_streak ≥3 must hold before the tile can ever appear

entries.title: XP economy — 30-rank ladder + void tier
notes: Rank ladder rewritten end-to-end: 30 ranks across cyan/magenta/amber/transcend/void tiers (Ⅰ NOVICE → ⅩⅩⅩ K̷ANJI.exe)
Void tier (ranks 26–30) carries combining-mark distortion + chromatic-aberration text-shadow + jitter so it reads as unstable
Daily HOT challenge now has a two-tier bonus: GOLD (3×) on the first run of the day, SILVER (1.5×) on subsequent runs
Per-mode XP balances retuned to land N5/N4/N3 finishers at meaningful rank checkpoints

entries.title: Streak celebrations + tap-for-detail panes
notes: Streak ember puff on continue, dust shake on break, magenta twinkle on personal best
Tap any home pane for detail popover (forecast 30-day, deck breakdown, rank ladder, streak history, full leech list, kanji stroke order, ladder tier breakdown)
XP bar fills in on mount, panes stagger-cascade in
Greeting pool expanded; tap version chip for changelog

entries.title: Run polish
notes: Run cards with many readings/examples shrink the kanji instead of scrolling
